message:
chore(gitignore): add agent/compiler ephemeral file patterns

Added patterns to prevent accidental commits of:
- .plan.md - agent planning files
- screenshots_for_diagnostics/ - diagnostic artifacts
- rustc-ice-*.txt - compiler crash reports
- reports/ - generated reports
- .agent-mail.yaml - agent config

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,3 +4,8 @@ target/
 
 # Common local artifacts (avoid accidental commits)
 a.out
+.plan.md
+screenshots_for_diagnostics/
+rustc-ice-*.txt
+reports/
+.agent-mail.yaml
